name: lan-inkpad-enhanced
description: Enhanced LAN drawing pad with real-time tab streaming, zoom and low-latency ink.

scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && node --check desktop/app.js && node --check mobile/app.js && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node --check extension/offscreen.js
scripts.apk:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
